title: Ozomelis violacea
taxonomy: Ozomelis violacea belongs to the family of plants known as Orchidaceae. This genus Ozomelis is part of the subfamily Epidendroideae. The exact classification of Ozomelis violacea is within the tribe Vandeae. However, further classification within the tribe might be required for precise identification. The classification of Ozomelis violacea may be subject to ongoing research and updates.

The plant's exact mechanisms and efficacy in treating various ailments are not well understood, and further studies are required.
